verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Seek ye first the kingdom of God, And His righteousness. And all these things shall be added unto you, Hallelu…, Hallelujah.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah! Hallelujah, hallelujah! Hallelu…, Hallelujah!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Man shall not live by bread alone. But by every Word That proceeds from the mouth of God. Hallelu…, Hallelujah.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Ask, and it shall be given unto you, Seek, and ye shall find. Knock, and it shall be opened unto you. Hallelu…, Hallelujah.
